enchantment.koneko.march.desc: Summons March soldiers to fight alongside you when attacking a target. 2 soldiers per level, capped at 450 soldiers.
enchantment.koneko.jade_charm.desc: Can be added to a Totem of Undying via an anvil, granting it durability as the totem's usage count.
text.koneko.march.no_march_weapon: Hold a weapon enchanted with March in your main hand.
text.koneko.march.cleaned: Cleaned %s tracked March entities. Old leftovers can be removed with /kill @e[tag=konekomarch_march_entity] or by name.
screen.koneko.march.config.title: Koneko March Config
screen.koneko.march.config.help: Auto-guard entity list: click an entity ID to enable or disable it. The list includes monster-spawn-group entities, defaults, and custom entries. Multiplayer servers receive this client config.
screen.koneko.march.config.search_placeh: Search, e.g. zombie, minecraft, or modid
screen.koneko.march.config.enabled_visib: Enabled %s entities from the current filtered list.
